name: Plinx
description: Cultivate a meaningful relationship with this deceptively simple battery-powered pistol. The Plinx rewards attention and investment from the wise.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Cultivate a meaningful relationship with this deceptively simple battery-powered pistol. The Plinx rewards attention and investment from the wise.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Gyromag Systems
components.description:
A modular component that regulates latitude and altitude in various Corpus systems. 

Location: Obtained by completing Heists on the Orb Vallis (Venus)

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: The Tenet Plinx is available in the pool of weapons offered by Sisters of Parvos.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Quatz reload and Plinx charge reload audio issues when a Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Plinx becoming unusable if a negative Multishot Riven is equipped on it.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed misaligned firing from the Plinx.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Plinx being misaligned with the Warframe’s hand.
